$comment: MailAegis update & announcement channel. Edit this file, commit it, push it — every running copy of MailAegis picks it up within a few hours. See channel/README.md for the field reference.

latest.notes: Several mailboxes, compose with outbound scanning, and an Android app.
changelog: Several mailboxes at once — security@, finance@ and info@ side by side, with a unified inbox.
Compose, reply and forward — and everything you send is scanned before it leaves.
Replying to a flagged message now warns you when its Reply-To points somewhere else.
Search operators: from:, has:attachment, is:malicious, score>50 — plus saved searches.
Pin, flag, read/unread, bulk actions, keyboard shortcuts and dark mode.
One-click presets for Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Mailcow, Zimbra and more.
Android app and an installable PWA, so a phone works too.
Installers that look like software rather than something you should close.

announcements.title: MailAegis is open source — and free forever.
announcements.body: If it saves your team from one wire-transfer fraud, a star on GitHub is all we ask.
